description_long: This is an older model green sedan with a weathered, rusty exterior, featuring a boxy body style and rounded roof. The car has four doors, black-tinted windows, and chrome trim around the windows and bumpers. The front grille is wide and horizontal, with a pair of round headlights and a slightly protruding hood. The wheels are steel with simple hubcaps, and the tires appear worn. The rear of the car has a large back window, small taillights, and a subtle trunk indentation. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian vehicle that has seen significant use, likely from the mid-20th century.
description: A weathered green four-door sedan with chrome trim, round headlights, and a boxy, vintage design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, round headlights, and slightly rusted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, chrome trim, and worn wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large back window, small taillights, and trunk indentation.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, trim, and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: Steel wheels with simple, round, silver hubcaps and black tires; no visible spokes.
